2026-03-31T09:57:56.0728916Z

2026-03-31T09:57:57.3665293Z

Exceeding these limits will result in an immediate error with specific guidance. NOTE: By default, this tool requires discussions:write permission. 2026-03-31T09:58:14.1911328Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-31T09:58:14.1911682Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
